top_profane.text: Don't waste your money. They spend a lot on Marketing and make everything look great and sound great but it's all a bunch of useless low quality crap. I've been a member for a year and have received 4 Boxes plus an extra for the Holidays. I can't really even tell you what most of the stuff was in the previous boxes...because the only thing I've actually ever used was a pair of socks. Wore those once! The rest of the stuff I've given to my 18 year old son. Crappy sun glasses, some pretty offensive cologne, an imitation leather backpack? I've not used or really kept anything. If I were 18-20 years old and didn't have anything, then this might be ok, but I'm older and have a real leather backpack and a couple of pairs of Good sunglasses, decent cologne and plenty of socks, so for me this was a huge waste of money. I called once to cancel after the 2nd box but they talked me into giving it another chance, so I gave it a year......but I canceled today after getting the oh so Hyped "Holiday Box" (Marketing). I'll be the first to admit that I like getting stuff and buying stuff but it totally sucks to get this package that looks incredible (Marketing) only to open it and find nothing of any real use, or more importantly of any real quality. All money is spent on the boxes, the brochures and the internet hype....the product is knock off crap! The Holiday box I just got was probably the
top_profane.title: Really NOT worth it!

top_profane.text:
EDIT: I took the 16 records I received from these goof-balls to my local used record store. He gave me $0.25 in store credit each for the ones that were not completely worthless. I just gave hime the rest in hopes that somebody someday might be willing to pay $1 for this crap helping my local record store stay open. Comically bad. WAY OVERPRICED!

Imagine yourself at a flea market. But not the nice kind with hippies, organic farmers and local artisans. I'm talking about the ones with meth addicts looking for arbitrage opportunities and purveyors of stolen goods. Now imagine you happen upon a stand selling used records. But not just any records... these are like from your Aunt Tonya's basement. You know, K-tel, K-mart clearance, really crappy Columbia House releases that Aunt Tonya got in 1973 because she was too lazy to send back her card and decline the monthly selection. Now imagine that she stored these awful albums in a vat of hobo-urine until the paper sleeves and covers were smelly and disfigured beyond recognition . Then, she used the vinyl as a rasp to file down her fugly toenails to a manageable length for trimming. Then upon her death, the records were improperly stored for 40 years in a 125-degree thrift-store warehouse on their sides, because the thrift store realized that these albums sucked so bad that nobody would pay $1 for them making these records u
top_profane.title: Crap. Utter and complete crap.

top_profane.text: So I had this prior to Funko bitching out and sending them to other distributors... I loved it then. You got a cool patch, a pin, a shirt, a pop figure usually another smaller one. When I found out Funko wasnt doing it themselves anymore I was sad but glad it would still be available.... after buying this piss poor excuse of a fan box... I'm mad. Mad I spent the money and mad for expecting nothing to have changed. They have one more box to impress me, but I'm not holding my breath. Should have kept it how it was before Amazon acquired it and turned it into a cash cow piece of crap.
top_profane.title: Dont bother, it's not the same as the old crates.

top_profane.text:
$60 and 2 boxes in I’m seriously underwhelmed by these. The Deadpool box was junk outside of the Pop, they should’ve tossed a tee shirt in. Just got the Venom box and I guess it’s worth the $30 price point, but if they don’t make the next one so totally amazing, I’ll be canceling.

Update: Latest box came. The Movie Moment is amazing and that’s it with the box... again, no tee shirt and the filler crap is just that, crap. Lame Pez, giving that away. The other mystery things will stay a mystery as I toss them in the junk pile with the taco holder, luggage tag, squeeze ball and tiny Dorbz junk. And I’m now cancelling the service. Don’t care what the next one is.

Update again...
So, I had thought I cancelled this service and another box shows up on my doorstep that I did not want. All useless crap for me. I would maybe pay $10 for the Pop, but I have zero interest in toe socks, a note pad and pencil and Rock Candy Dark Phoenix. Next box is Captain Marvel... which I really don’t want even if it were free.
top_profane.title: Not worth $30

top_profane.text: Stuff was crap,you keep sending me the same crap you need to be put out of business I want a refund you advertise a lie you don't send anything different your a rip off, your justvas sorry as your snacks for lying to people and selling this nasty crap you should be ashamed  I want my money back I can get better stuff from the dollar store I want my money back
top_profane.title: Crap

top_profane.text: Product are crap. You pay $45 for 2 toys that are no fun basic as hell and disgusting treats your dogs won’t even eat. Then you try to cancel and get out of the scam of a subscription and they not only ignore you but continue to charge you they’re ridiculous price and send you crap. Save your money.
top_profane.title: Save your money.

top_profane.text: Apparently a curated box of premium products is the new slang for bunch of Chinese knockoff gadgets. I only ordered the one summer 2020 box but it was a real disappointment. Crap toy projector, car charger that charged so slowly my phone actually lost power while plugged in and a bunch of other crap I have no use for. I liked the picnic blanket but everything else was useless garbage.
top_profane.title: Save your money and stop supporting the cheap crap industry

top_profane.text: Save your Money the figures are Bobble heads which are crap. oh also you get a crap tee and a pin.  go to toyWiz and buy what you want
top_profane.title: Not impressed October 2019

top_profane.text:
This is one of the most miserable made up boxes of nothing but crap! Thank you for this CRAP!!
I WONT EAT IT! PLEASE DONT MAKE ME!
top_profane.title: COULD BE POISON!  TASTES LIKE IT IS!

top_profane.text:
1. Boxed items not worth $50-$90.
2. Received crappy plastic hair ties.
3. Nothing worth $15 so there was no $15+ mystery item.
4. All masks, no makeup or perfume.
I did not receive anything worth over $5 in the box, extremely disappointing. You would think they would make sure the first box you received would be impressive, NOT. I think they sent me crap they had left over that they needed to get rid of, they may have good products but i did not receive and of them :/
top_profane.title: Not worth what they claim

top_profane.text: Just reading the top several reviews and looking at the pictures it is readily apparent that this is a box of garbage. The knives are trash - fact. The ties look like they’re from TJ max. You can buy a nylon crappy hammock for $10 and just like this one, it will be terrible. Don’t waste your money this is a trashy ripoff.
top_profane.title: Trash Bix

top_profane.text: I really tried to like these boxes.  The First, Deadpool, was ok, but not really worth the cost.  The Second, Venom, was better, and if that was where they stayed I'd have been ok with the boxes.  But this one is complete garbage.  From the comments about Whiplash vs Iron Man as the choice of Pop to the 3 minor pieces of garbage included.  This was my last shot, I've cancelled and won't be coming back to this crap.
top_profane.title: Run, don't walk, away from these boxes

top_profane.text:
Since the very first box I received, which was the deadpool unicorn box, i have been extremely disappointed in this collection. Outside ofthe deadpool unicorn pop, all other pops received are not great. The other thrown ins are just as bad. Shoddy dollar store quality. This months box had a wolverine pencil topper a notebook and some socks...really guys...socks? cool designs on the socks? nope, crappy xmen logo. Maybe throw in a good character pop? Nope. They thrown in Angel.

I tried to be a good fan and give them some chances but i can't keep throwing my $$ away for garbage. Sad to say but subscription finally cancelled today
top_profane.title: Bad...Waited to see if it got better...it didn't

top_profane.text:
I was so excited about getting this! I had been thru a terrible loss & needed to be extra good to myself for a while to keep my sanity. I filled out everything & chose my preferences. The first box was nice, not worth the value they put on it but these things never are. After that all i remember is ORANGE GLITTER! What makeup pro thinks a 58 year old disabled woman wants to wear bright ORANGE glitter? It took months to cut it off partly because i was so depressed & partly because they make it very hard to find where you cut it off! Every month i just got more pissed. What a miserable experience! Out of about a year of boxes i used maybe 3 items.
Gift boxes are such a great idea if they had the right people picking the products. Its like they sent the garbage that would never ever sell. Matt fuscia sharpie comes off easier lipstick with orange glitter not shimmer eye shadow, yep. I'll be rockin my new look anyday now! It's a great look for the newly widowed in your family! No need to worry that you'd be hit on by anyone. I hadn't been wearing ANY makup at all for about a year & had i worn what they sent I would've been sent to the loony bin for sure. It feels really good to get this out, apologies if it's a little over the top.
top_profane.title: ORANGE GLITTER IS THE NEW NEUTRAL

top_profane.text:
I was really excited to start getting theses boxes. I have gotten 3 boxes so far, I wanted to give it a fair shake as I almost cancelled after the first box.

I have fair skin and dark straight hair. Most of what was in the boxes was self tanners ( i dont tan) and frizz control for hair. If it was in one box, I could understand, but, these being the staple of like all the boxes?? So, there was a couple tiny face creams, one of which I was able to even get 3 uses out of! Whoopie! Oh, don't let me forget the purple eyeliner, the orange shimmery eyeshadow and the orange shimmery lipgloss.

The boxes feel like items they got free from the manufacturer along with items that didn't sell. Like you know when you go to a beauty store and they have those little clearance bins with all the crappy stuff and you get excited for a second, until you see the selection? Well, trust me, you're better off spending your 15.00 per month on things you actually want. You won't be excited when you get these, it's trash. Im going to ipsy.
top_profane.title: Really Lame Items

top_profane.text: I own every marvel collector corps from the beginning, always looked forward to it never regretted it. But now ive given amazon 3 attempts. Unhappy with box 1 deadpool providing crap items like a taco holder. box 2 was okay with a decent venom pop and shirt it was alright but box 3 was straight up insulting. Even though its a double pop it honestly feels cheap and out of all the iconic MCU struggles they could choose they did one with a 1 time villain but its not the pop that killed it but he extra items. a hulk pez and 2 VERY TINY thor/thanos figures all 3 items painted gold with no other coloring can barely tell what they are literally cheap trash. Its like paying $30 for a funk pop at this point. 3 boxes only 1 had a shirt Which is one of the more valuable items the subscription contains. I kept thinking the bad reviews would open their eyes but its not worth getting anymore. i used to feel like i got something of value before amazon picked this up.
top_profane.title: We had a good run.

top_profane.text: My first box was the Deadpool 2 Box, and other than the Deadpool on a unicorn funko, and a luggage tag it was garbage.  So out comes this Box, AAAANNNNNDDDD ( Cue the price is right fail music ) Cool Venom Funko, but the craptastic venom stress foam ball, .02 cent sticker, super little mini fig, and a shirt that is the smallest 3XL I've ever seen!  They get one more chance and then I'm out of here.  Not that Funko Pop cares
top_profane.title: Strike two, three strikes and you're out!

top_profane.text:
Horrible Company! Absolute garbage! I’ve been a subscriber for over a year. This used to be a good subscription box. It came in cute packaging and had great products. Then, the company got greedy. They raised the prices. Changed the boxes to cheap junk. The new products are horrible.
Just received my new monthly box and it’s a bunch of crap that you’d find in the clearance isle at Marshall’s discount department store.
I’m done. Cancelling my subscription with Allure and signing up with a competitor.
top_profane.title: Worst Subscription Box Out There. (I’ve tried them all)

top_profane.text:
Well....here’s the deal. I subscribed to this Marvel fan pack for my wife. She has always been an avid follower of The Marvel Universe and I figured this was the perfect thing to surprise her with. I had read thru all the less than encouraging reviews before her box got here and thought ,oops I may have made a mistake here. After reading about only partial boxes where not everyone got the same items and the less than thrilled attitudes of serious collectors I was worried . Well, I figured it was the first shipment after the Marvel/Funko merger, and she would be getting the next box and it should be much better right? Well, I kid you not, my wife not only did not receive the next collector box in the series (she was sent the Deadpool box), And, she was sent a box with only 3 fricken items in it.
A lot of people complained about the items they received and I agreed with most of them. But how about getting your first fan box which was to have 4-7 top quality collectors items in it and having only three things in the whole box!!!!, the main Deadpool on the unicorn, a key chain and a piece of crap taco truck.

I am flabbergasted and am leaving it up to my wife as to whether she wants to give it one more try or just cancel the subscription as an idea that was meant well but fell short.

I am so angry at this joke that I can’t figure out why anyone would wa
top_profane.title: Got this subscription for my wife, I am embarrassed

top_profane.text: Recipes reek of an anti-meat agenda. WTF is a "beet-ball"? Who wants to make fun characters out of potatoes? If you like making high-carbohydrate crap that your kids won't eat (and you won't either) then get this rip-off subscription box. Otherwise, find a recipe online that you and your kids would want to eat and save yourself the money.
top_profane.title: Spaghetti and "Beet Balls"? Gross recipes with tons of carbs and virtually no meat.

top_profane.text: I'm done. Garbage. Look at what the first year boxes looked like. THOSE were worth it. This is dollar store crap at its finest.
top_profane.title: Cancelled

top_profane.text: If I join a vinyl club an you send me one picture disc I’m out so fast it’s spin a record off the platter don’t be trash pick good records not garbage you trash bags
top_profane.title: Trash

top_profane.text:
I was gifted a six month subscription and was beyond excited for it. Having previously read reviews about how frustrating it was to have to wait for the next box; I waited until I had the full set before sitting down to "play" with a friend. To say I was disappointed would be an understatement.

The items sent in each box were generally a handful of printouts and a sprinkling of plastic garbage from a bulk retailer. The story often felt forced to bend around and include whatever random favor they threw in the box that month.

The clues in some instances required huge bodies of knowledge the average person doesn't have, or giant leaps to reach the expected conclusion.

Some examples:

1. A 1.5 inch piece of plastic thread taped to the back of an astronomy themed postcard. Apparently I was too know the postcard depicted Orpheus in constellation and the plastic tubing was also to indicate a link to Orpheus and his musical talents. What was the significance of Orpheus? Simply to let you know to continue looking forward. Irrelevant to the game's overall solution.

2. a postcard showing the name of a city. This was included to confirm the writer's previous claims of being from that city. How that confirms anything is beyond me.

3. A printout of some email correspondence between two people. This was too prompt you to email
top_profane.title: Don't waste your time or your money

top_profane.text: A friend sent this to me as a gift. Most of this is not even organic, and is just cheap junk that happens to be vegan.  Many things in here have huge amounts of sugar and unhealthy oils, and a shocking amount of sodium.  Some even have corn syrup, and one chocolate bar comes with a California cancer warning.  I wouldn’t call any of this “food”.  Don’t poison yourself with this crap;  eat real food that doesn’t come in a wrapper.
top_profane.title: Vegan junk food

top_profane.text: I myself was looking for more beauty products for hair, lips ckeeks n eyes.  Not at all  interested in moisturizers n lotions n crap like that! Not sure if I will continue unless products change
top_profane.title: Could be better read review!

top_profane.text:
I wanted to give my kids something interesting since we are all stuck at home during lockdown, so I decided to spring for a snack box subscription. I chose Japanese snacks because I can't eat gluten and on occasion, they have rice-based snacks so even I can join in the fun sometimes. Through a series of bizarre circumstances I accidentally ordered a "Tokyo Treat" brand box AND this Bokksu in the same month, and it was too late to cancel when I found out. I can say that this box is absolutely better. I has full descriptions, interesting information, allergen info, and a really nice selection. It says they are premium quality and they really are -- this isn't gas station crap, it's delicious. The kids love it, and I like it, too. As far as value for money, it's a little pricey but it's coming from Japan, and in my box everything arrived whole and in good condition. I like that it comes with tea, too.

The short version is that this is definitely better than Tokyo Treat, and it's cheaper, and it's a really nice and interesting thing that kids enjoy and so do I. Not really the best budgeting choice, but I justify it to myself because I'm only buying gas for the car once a month now.
top_profane.title: High Quality and Delicious

top_profane.text: Finally received our first box. It's a culture fly box. Two items, the picture "frame" which was falling apart and the led tote bag arrived broken. Very disappointing and I'm pissed.
top_profane.title: Not worth the wait or money.

top_profane.text: I love my Allure box, I signed up through their website but figured I'd leave my opinion on here as well. I've only received a few items I didn't use, and even then they made great gifts(that I didn't have to pay full price for), plus my sister loves when I pass things off to her as she tends to use and love the items I'm not into. As long as you are open to trying new products, which is the whole point of beauty boxes this is an awesome deal. If you only want certain items just buy the ones you want, but if your open to new items and expanding your makeup and skincare collection this is definitely a top box to get. For $15 the sizes you get are way better than ipsy and play from sephora. I've actually liked some of these boxes better than boxycharm which costs more. I've found many holy grail products from my Allure beauty boxes and actually repurchased the full sizes. I didn't expect to do that when I first got them. There's always a good variety of items, skincare & makeup. It's one of my favorite boxes that I've never canceled or paused as I have had to do with most of my other subscriptions when a crappy box was coming up. I don't know how anyone could complain about this one for only $15 a month. Love it.
top_profane.title: One of my favorite beauty subscriptions!

top_profane.text: I was really excited that this box arrived early! I also love how the packaging is entirely compostable. The products were nice. I wish the box had more products and less filler. I am a little pissed off that they claim that a lip balm costs $30.
top_profane.title: Ok, but pricey

top_profane.text: The first box was good. I really like the book included that has the story of the two main characters traveling around the world and from every place they traveled to there’s a souvenir attached to the page. But from the second box on there’s only a song book in the package, which is crappy and we don’t like it at all. I really like the book in their first box and if they can keep including a similar book in every box it’s a great subscription. Unfortunately they didn’t. I am cancelling my subscription as a result.
top_profane.title: Only the first box is worth it

top_rant.text:
How to Be a Redhead is a great beauty subscription box with a unique specialty— it’s for redheads. It’s available as a regular monthly subscription (for $25) or deluxe subscription (for $65 which arrives quarterly) both are well worth it and both are packed with goodies that are suitable for redheads!

For years I wanted to buy one of those monthly beauty subscription boxes, but I never did because I knew from experience that any time I’d buy an all inclusive selection of makeup (skin products, or eyeshadow palettes etc…) inevitably I end up getting annoyed and frustrated that almost everything in it is suited to “average” skin tones, which (compared to most redheads) that ends up being about 3-to-4 shades too dark— and therefore half of the pre-selected items would be useless— and that’s if I’m lucky! It usually ended up being more like 80% useless products that are all wrong for a redhead’s skin.

I understand the redhead population is relatively small (it’s estimated at only 1%–2% of the world’s population) but that said, it’s still a lot of people and as consumers, a redhead’s money is worth every bit as much as a blonde’s or a brunette’s, so it annoyed me how everything was catered to being either blonde or brunette and redheads (along with other groups) were all relegated to one “miscellaneous” category. Understanding this is one thing but I still wish
top_rant.title: Best beauty subscription for redheads

top_rant.text:
VMP offers yearly subscription for a cheaper price if you buy a year at a time. I also get a email notification from them and I can either skip the copy or get a previous copy to sell as they sell for a lot compared with most record clubs. It’s more expensive, but they make the covers which are very thick and all of the pressings are exclusive and 180g pressings. Some are even 45rpm remastered. I know many people are going to say they don’t like VMP or it’s too expensive. But I like knowing what I am getting and have plenty of time to exchange it, or if I don’t want a duplicate or something else, I will get a month’s credit.

The one thing that Amazon has FINALLY made an improvement with is their packaging for vinyl. The old method was absolutely terrible and I never purchased vinyl from Amazon because of this issue. I recently purchased two Phish LP on LP copies and discovered that they finally updated their packaging procedure!

Almost every album I would order, would arrive with either bent edges or corners, or worse, large seam splits or both! I can’t say it’s the post office every time either. I returned a copy of Bob Mould - Workbook 25 because it had about 2 inches of the spine missing from poor packaging. Another issue I have had with Amazon and vinyl pressings is that in the past, I ordered two Mobile Fidelity Sound Labs pressings and they kept sa
top_rant.title: Haven’t Tried This Yet, But Might If I Can Get Some Answers?

top_rant.text:
I received the 25 snack box for the first time and was not impressed, the box came 1/4 filled, and the other 3/4 was empty space, what a ripoff for $40 per month. Everything was super tiny, I could fit several items in the palm of my hand. The snacks included 3 little bags of pretzels, various kinds of jerky, lots of energy bars, and two little bags of random chips. These things seem like stuff they couldn't sell at a grocery store and they just packed it up in box to resell for unsuspecting customers. I appreciate that the snacks are healthy but I think I can definitely get more worth of my $40 buying it from a supermarket, personally. Maybe if the cost of the subscription box was halved I would continue my subscription, but at the current price, it's best to look elsewhere for snack boxes.

I forgot to cancel my subscription so I got a second box, still full of the same little tiny pretzels, energy bars, and jerky. At least this time I got a small bag of cookies...It feels like this company really loves their pretzels, I have so many pretzels now instead of a variety of chips or crisps, how disappointing. To inform how little you're actually getting, I had combined both snack boxes together and there is still space for probably a third box of snacks. If the original box included twice the amount of snacks it had, it would be a better deal, and I would feel like it w
top_rant.title: Boxes full of miniature snacks for fairies, not people!

top_rant.text:
I was so excited for this. I am currently toward the end of writing something I have been working on for three years so I opened this up like it was going to spring forth some golden light and writing fairies were going to come out handing me pens and stickers and little trinkets that I had never thought of.

But I got some hot chocolate. I can’t eat chocolate or sugar. So that was a waste.

I got some really ugly fabric thumbtacks from the couture collection. I like the idea. But these bright orange and black, crayola blue with halloween orange triangles all on a tiny pin for me to post on a wall of my work is never going to happen. They belong in a remainder pile somewhere. Oh wait, maybe that’s where they found them!

And then I got a coaster that looks like a record player but says, when you read it around in a circle “Replaying my thoughts and plots- Scribbler”. Not a bad idea but the coaster is made from a weird material. It feels awkward. I wouldn’t trust my hot drinks on this thing,

Then there was a small booklet that gave some help on writing. I quite liked that. It had some very good ideas.

There is an a button that says, “Ask Me About My Novel.” I have not yet become that pretentious. Nor do I ever plan too. And if I did, it wouldn’t be with a teal and bright yellow pin.

And lastly a book and a nametag wi
top_rant.title: Stay Away, It Is Expensive And Awful

top_rant.text:
Got the Deadpool box. It was meh. Between the cool Pop and keychain I would have paid 30 but it wasn't a "deal". Skipped Venom. Not a big fan. Marvel 10 year!!! This could be cool. Maybe a bunch of small stuff spanning all the movies. Maybe a large exclusive avengers Pop! Nope.
Ironman 2 with Ironman fighting Whiplash as the big pop. A pez and a couple of dorbz. If this had been $10 I wouldn't have bought it.
10 years of Marvel and you picked the big Pop from the Movie that's consistently in most fans bottom 5. 10 years and that's your go to. And a hulk pez from Ragnorak. Meh. And two dorbz from Ragnorak. Meh and you already covered that with the pez.
Never again. It's a piddling amount of stuff for a loot box but also horribly curated.
The Funko Pop does look cool. It's well made and it was one of Ironman's cooler suits but come on. 10 years to pull from.

Subscription officially cancelled and no box will entice me back.

Edit** Three things.
One I should talk about the overall subscription. They say 4 to 7 items. Of the three boxes they’ve had two with 4 and one with 5.... Also t-shirt not guaranteed despite giving t-shirt size with subscription. Okay. Of three boxes only one has had a shirt and if I’m reading it right the X-Men box won’t have a shirt. So one of four. So while this review mostly hit the ten year box the overall val
top_rant.title: Total Bomb

top_rant.text:
Ok, I’ve had over bcA year of dealing with this subscription company-and I’d like to share a. Review from two viewpoints-the subscription department end & the product end of it.

Subscription department: I’ve had a subscription for over a year now, SOMETIMES TWO! How? Bc at one point they somehow started another one with my card information-( I think it was bc I tried to prepay for 3 months at a time.) One month I even got 3 BAGS!!! I had referred my mom to the club & at the time the reward they were offering was a free bag,-instead if adding a month on my pre-paid account-they just sent an additional bag for that month! So I got 3 bags of lip stuff I ended up not using!! Since it was a prepaid gift card, I wasn’t too freaked about canceling it & became amused at what exactly they were going to try to keep pulling with it as long as they were allowed. When they kept trying to charge me for a 3 month subscription I DID try to find where & how to cancel it, but it’s not obvious. I finally decided to just send it to their customer care department and it wasn’t ever acknowledged. As a subscription company I feel their customer service is non-existent. Unless you are subscribing you won’t easily find anyone to help you.

PRODUCT REVIEW: see subscription review! No I know I need to be more clear-there were a few good products that I got from them? But overall it’
top_rant.title: There’s 2 sides to this company-and I’ll tell u about both....

top_rant.text:
WHEN WE ADOPTED A 10 WEEK-OLD BLUE MERLE POMERANIAN (WHO WAS A LITTLE OVER 2 LBS AT THE TIME), I COULDN'T RESIST THE HYPE OF GETTING A MONTHLY PACKAGE IN THE MAIL WITH NEW TOYS (TOYS!!!) AND TREATS TO TRY (TREATS!!!). I PREPAID FOR THE 6 MONTH SUBSCRIPTION AND WAS PLEASANTLY SURPRISED BY THE QUALITY OF ITEMS, THE WELL CRAFTED HUMOR INFUSED TOYS AND TAGS WITH AN ASSORTMENT OF FEATURES SUCH AS SQUISHY, CRUNCHY, SQUEAKY, ETC).

I WAS NEVER DISAPPOINTED AND REMINGTON LOVED DELIVERY DAY. WHEN MY SITUATION IN LIFE CHANGED, HE WAS REHOMED TO A WONDERFUL NEW "POM MOM" AND JOINED AN OLDER BROTHER WHO SOON TAUGHT HIM WHERE TO PEE AND HOW TO BEG FOR TREATS. HE'S LIVING HIS BEST LIFE EVER!!

IT WAS EASY FOR ME TO SWITCH THE ADDRESS OF DELIVERY TO HIS NEW HOME AND THE PACKAGES WERE AS BIG A HIT THERE AS THEY WERE FOR ME.

I CONTACTED THE COMPANY TODAY WHEN I REALIZED THAT MY CREDIT CARD WAS ABOUT TO BE CHARGED FOR ANOTHER SUBSCRIPTION. I WASN'T SURE IF I WAS ALREADY TOO LATE BUT WAS REASSURED THAT THE CANCELLATION COULD BE COMPLETED AND THERE WOULD BE NO FURTHER CHARGES (OR BOXES).

CUSTOMER SERVICE WAS KIND AND UNDERSTANDING AND ASKED WHY I CANCELLED. I WAS HONEST AND TOLD THE REPRESENTATIVE THAT IT WAS ONLY DUE TO MY BEING TEMPORARILY UNEMPLOYED AND NOT DUE TO ANY DISSATISFACTION WITH ANY BARK BOXES. (I EVEN SENT A PIC OF MY SWEET PUP TO MELT THEIR
top_rant.title: ABSOLUTELY WORTH EVERY PENNY!

top_rant.text:
First of all, these shirts are all of good quality. They're soft, well-made and comfortable. After being washed a few times, the decals are still completely intact with no fading or peeling. No complaints there.

As far as the designs go, it's a really mixed bag. I've received seven of them so far. Some I love, and some I hate. Here's how I would rate them in the order in which they arrived:

Shirt #1: Painted Beholder - Rating: 5/5
This is my favorite of the bunch so far. The image is of very high quality, mostly red, green and white on a black shirt. The beholder looks fearsome and awesome, and it seems to be about to do battle with an elven adventurer. Absolutely love it.

Shirt #2: Dagger and Dice - Rating: 2/5
I wasn't very impressed with this one. The colors are bright to the point of being garish. The design itself is a bit shoddy and looks more like a rub-on tattoo from a gumball machine than something professional. I don't much care for white shirts, maybe it would have looked better on black?

Shirt #3: Drizzt Do'Urden - Rating: 4/5
This one's pretty cool. It features Drizzt in a stoic pose, with the outlines of Guenhwyvar, Icingdeath and Twinkle around him. The colors are fairly simplistic, mostly purple, black, orange and yellow. It's on a navy background, which compliments it well. Very nice overall.
top_rant.title: It's A Mixed Bag, But Still Fun

top_rant.text:
I have just received my first box and was prepared to be somewhat disappointed after reading quite a few reviews...
The delivery took a long time and I was super excited to finally receive my first bag of goodies.
The bag itself is super cute but not of fantastic quality, the zipper is pretty flimsy.
I received 4 full sized products (the product description on amazon said 4-5 products per month) but unlike advertised only 3 of them were lip products - the accompanying card said the company decided to switch things up with a “Monthly Mixup” - not sure I’m super thrilled about that.
The first thing I noticed is that there was no description given for the products I received or the manufacturers of those products.
I actually had to google the items to determine which one wasn’t the lip item! Since I subscribed to try out new products and companies I’m unfamiliar with I’d very much appreciate some pointers along with the products!
Now to the products themselves:
1. cougar lipgloss in cocoa - the website promises 24hrs of matte lips in “the perfect nude brown” - not a color I’d have picked but I think I’ll be able to use it on occasion
2. Cargo gel lipstick in Sicily - a bright, bold red. It’s a pretty color but certainly not fit for everyday use for me. Again not a color I’d have bought for myself.
3. Appeal gel liner in deep taupe - it’
top_rant.title: I have cancelled after receiving my second box - updated review

top_rant.text:
UPDATE November, 2019:
I think it's time to put my money into a different subscription. Each month, there are fewer and fewer full and "deluxe sample" size products. Those that are full size aren't worth much money. There's no point of me putting my money into so many samples.

OVERVIEW:
I just received my first Cocotique box. I was a little nervous, as I'm new to subscription boxes, but I'm actually quite satisfied with the products. Most of them are full-size, and others are large enough to get quite a few uses out of. The month's box (the actual cardboard box the products are in) is absolutely beautiful! Included is a card with extensive information about all of the products, including prices and where to find them should you decide to purchase them. I absolutely love that they included this because I can easily find the products if I want to order them, and I can see the value of the products versus the cost of the box ($25/month).

PRODUCTS:
With that being said, the value of the products in the box is well worth the cost of the subscription (in this box, at least). The price of the products come up to about double the cost of the box (approximately $47). So, I'm happy with the value. You get more than 2 or 3 items, and they're pretty large.

CUSTOMER SERVICE CONTACT:
One item (eyeshadow) was broken (still sealed). I emaile
top_rant.title: Was great...not so much now.

top_rant.text:
After seeing a video online for this service, I decided to give it a try. I just received my first box, but it was underwhelming. This is what I received:

Standard PC AC cable
Molex to SATA power adapter cable
80GB SATA 1 hard drive
PCI based modem card
Excelius retractable cleaning brush

The parts were packaged well and included a handwritten manifest of the parts that were given.

I realize it is a mystery box and what you get will be different every month and different than what someone else gets, but the claim that every box contains $55 or more of parts is not accurate based on my first box. At best I’d say $15 tops. The only item of any value is the hard drive, but at only 80GB and SATA 1 it is only good for use with older systems and laptops...fine for Windows XP or 7. That’s really about a $10 used part based on prices on the bay. The rest of the parts I got were “meh”. The cleaning brush is nice but I’m sure it costed them maybe $1 each to have a bulk order of them purchased with their company name put on them. I’ll see what comes in the next box a month from now as I want to see if it is going to be crap again or if it will have some better parts worth more than what I paid. So far, not even close. I like the thrill of a mystery box, but it better live up to claim that there’s $55 or more in value. I’ll update my re
top_rant.title: Initial impression wasn't good, but the seller is making things right

top_rant.text:
*april - 3rd box AND I AM NOT DISAPPOINTED. Came about a week or more earlier than expected, got 45 instead of 40! Some of the movies i got this time were ones i planned on purchasing but never wanted to pay what the seller was asking for "such old movies", but Annie (the original w/ red head girl), Hocus Pocus and The Neverending story came! They do a nice job of trying to give you some of each genre you say you like. Of the 45 DVDs, 3 i already owned and 2 they sent me this month they had sent me last month (the phantom of the opera and chicago). After ordering 3 months the only CONS have been
- getting 2 they already sent (but to be fair i got 45x3= 135 dvds from them so far)
- last month i got the dvd knockaround guys, but about 20-30 mins in it kept freezing and skipping so unfortunately that one isnt any good (but still not their fault and it was bound to happen).
All in all i highly recommend if you are looking to add to your collection w/o paying much per movie (less than $1). I truly believe i will order again, but due to lack of space may have to stop sooner than i would like

* got my 2nd box (2nd month in a row that i ordered). Kept my genre selections about the same as im mostly doing this to have a bigger variety of kidmovies. Chose 40 pacl, got about 43 or 44 dvds. THE COMPANY DID NOT SEND ME ANY REPEATS! SO THATS A HUGE PLUS. I would say
top_rant.title: Update 3rd box purchased

top_rant.text:
Are you a 40'ish year old man? Have you been in the market for a fake leather pencil case? Perhaps a tied-dyed lapel pin that says GQ on it with a smiley face? Maybe you've been looking for the perfect 2 month coupon for an online meditation class that renews at $69.99 after the two months are up? If this sounds like you, look no further than the *BEST STUFF OF GQ!!!!!

You know it's the Best Stuff of GQ because it says so right on the box. Some cheap pre-workout that has who-knows-what in it will be sure to greet you the moment you open this little cube of excitement. Dig a little deeper and you'll find a 20% discount coupon for some junk that you'd never buy in the first place! AMAZING!

Looking for the perfect twine to wrap around your neck given the current state of the US election? GQ has you covered as well! COCONUT flavoured dental floss is included so you can use it for whatever arts and crafts project you have while you're sitting on the floor doing online meditation (for only 2 months, mind you) while trying to fit the rest of the junk into your brand-new faux-leather pencil case!

Act now and you'll receive a coupon for a very feminine sheep blanket! It comes in every colour you can think of as long as you only want white.

And are you completely unmotivated????! The "Impact Cards" will take your motivation from a 0.00 to a
top_rant.title: Do you need random trash in your life??!!?? Look no further!

top_rant.text: I did not get a subscription to these folks but I did get one of their products through an ipsy purchase. In fact it was that beaded bronzey leaved what I thought was a headband. What the deal was is you spend $10 and you get a mystery package from pink pewter. Well the mystery package was the one item and there was a price tag on it saying worth $19.99. I was like huh what's this? So there's no instructions on how to use it and I'm wondering what it is? Okay is this a headband hold back some hair? I try it and it's way too big for that. Is this something that goes across my forehead a decoration of some sort. not. Not my style but it's pretty so I tried to put it on my head and it just. Not only that it was made of utterly cheap metal and I had to fix it when it came out of the box. And even after fixing it it broke again. So I called customer service. They treated me is if I had the plague and I was a liar. They wanted pictures (which I don't mind but they wouldn't even talk to me until I sent them one) even after that I told him I want a refund I don't like this it's cheap and it's definitely not my style. So what do they do? They provide me with a return label (which I was surprised they even did that) and said we will refund you. however two weeks later I got in the mail another cheap pink pewter product. and they kept telling me they're handmade there of the highest quali
top_rant.title: Unfortunately their interpretation of a $19.99 product is my interpretation of utter cheapness.

top_rant.text:
Edited to add on July 7, 2019:
Subscription cancelled and I am reducing my 4 star rating to one star because I went to their website and looked at the cost of each of the chews sold separately and the total cost would be $15.72 plus flat rate shipping $7, so total cost would be $22.72. The first box was a good price and being able to try a variety of their chews was nice, but seeing how they could be bought separately for less than the $29.99 it would cost each month, the subscription box is not at all a good value.

Original review:
They advertise 7 different types of chews per box, and 7-15 total chews per box. I am now assuming looking at the card insert and photo in the product description that boxes for large dogs cost more because some of the chews are larger and it is assumed they’ll consume more chews each month so they get more per box.

I ordered the small size box for dogs under 20 lbs, and did receive 7 different types of treats (all 7 of the varieties shown for small dogs on the card the sent, see pic), and a total of 9 treats (see pics... they came in 3 bags... two of the bags had 3 different types of chews and the third bag contained the 2 large pig skins).

They appear to be high quality chews and my 2 dogs went nuts at the smell of the box, they knew it was something for them as I opened the box and tried to take the firs

top_exclaim.text: I don’t really know why people think that they have to order through amazon!!!? Geek fuel is only $29.00” when ya go through them!!! And that includes shipping and handling!!!!! And then it’s a great deal!!!!! And they have good months and then they have a bad one every so often!!!!? Ya can’t please everyone all the time!!!!? Ask my wife and her 8 personalities!!!!!? Lol God bless ya all today Shalom
top_exclaim.title: It’s only $29.00 when ya order through geek fuel!!

top_exclaim.text: I have been a Crazy CatLadyBox member for 4 years now!!  Honestly, I don't know who looks forward to the boxes more each month me or my kitties LOL I don't even have to say anything when I bring in the box...they recognize it immediately and know what time it is!  : )  My cats get 2 goodies and I get 3.  I kinda wish it was the other way since I have 3 cats but oh well.  The items are oh so creative....love the various shirts!!  Adore my sweatshirt and hoodie shirt!!  The garden stuff is super cute...oh and the fuzzy socks!! And the ceramics..LOVE!  Gosh there is just so much!  The bags and totes are great!  Ahh can't forget the blankets!  lol  And the kitty toys are super cute too!  The wands are fun and the plastic cat heads like milk ring things were a huge hit!!  The ribbons are fun as are the spinny things!  Of course some end up like the poor flower in the picture lol And I can't leave out the meowvelous customer service ladies.....they are absolutely the best!!  Paws up ladies....they are always super helpful and ready to do what it takes to make you happy.  When my light up kitty head phone charger cord didn't fit my phone....an adapter was in the mail pronto!  This is my one monthly treat.  If I had to cut costs...I'd have to cut spending elsewhere cuz my Crazy CatLadyBox is here to stay!!  : )
top_exclaim.title: Crazy CatLadyBox Meowzers!!

top_exclaim.text: These boxes are AMAZING!!!!! I have received 3 so far, I get them for my 10 year old daughter and she loves them too! So many good items!!! My daughter has some mental health issues and the inspirational quotes and sayings on the card have been so good for her! Its an awesome exciting bonding moment for us with every box! we open it and look at everything and then read through all the messages! We used to buy target beauty boxes and they are nothing compared to what these boxes are! The nice thing is I get the teen box for her and then we are both able to use the products! Thanks so much for what you guys do with these boxes because they have been super amazing for us!!! Not to mention.... after taking the products out the boxes are strong and sturdy and wonderful to use for storage for all kinds of things!!!!
top_exclaim.title: AMAZING!!!!

top_exclaim.text:
I look forward to getting my box every month!! I get great products every month with different items to try and they are all full size products! I have very sensitive skin and haven't had any problems with any of her products! She has beautiful boxes and it is really luxurious product for a VERY GOOD PRICE! I feel very pampered when I use each of the products! This is luxurious and outstanding products in every box! The best subscription box ever!!

I received my box today and it is soo elegantly put together. I am really impressed with how it is packaged and displayed. Everything smells fabulous and I am super excited to try the products. I will write a review once I use each product. Very nice size of all the products. Thanx Francesca darling!!! 1/15/2021 Update used the bath bomb and it was the most moisturizing bath bomb. I am not a fan of bath bombs but THIS one was really great!😍1/16/2021 used the body scrub and it was very nice, turns milky and also exfoliating. No need to moisturize after using. Next morning skin still moisturized!! Yahhh😉😉 this is a great box very good variety of products and she sent me an extra product!!! Love every box I have gotten all 3😘😘
top_exclaim.title: The Bestest!!! Look no more😘!!

top_exclaim.text: I really loved this box! Had some wonderful samples and full size as well! The samples of the Nexxus Keraphix Damage Healing shampoo and conditioner are phenomenal! I'm going to order the full size bottles and I get 25percent off of the product! The Laneige Lip Sleeping mask is absolutely amazing. I haven't tried the other products yet, but I know it's going to be great! I'm really pleased with my box! Can't wait for the next box to arrive! My September and my October boxes were wonderful! I can honestly say that thanks to Allure, I can wear false eyelashes now! My September box had the Tarte- center of attention - cruelty free lashes along with their award winning lash adhesive and it worked! I'm so happy! Thank you Allure! Then, I just received my October box, filled with all kinds of goodies! Hourglass mascara, YSL lip stain, Sunday Riley products and a lot more. I love being able to try different beauty products right at home. It's fun and exciting to open up your cute box to see what's inside! Thanks Allure! Keep them coming!
top_exclaim.title: I LOVE THIS BEAUTY BOX!

top_exclaim.text: This box is GREAT!!!!  I wished ordered months ago!!!  Was the best gift under the tree!!!  Great quality !!!  Great fun!!  Can’t wait for the next box! Also quick ship- was so so so happy arrived in time for Christmas.
top_exclaim.title: As much fun for the humans as well as furry loved ones!!!!

top_exclaim.text:
The DEADPOOL Marvel subscription was a dazzling disappointment.
The Funko box was packed with great stuff with t-shirts, caps, patches, pins and of course....great Pops!

The new Amazon Marvel subscription box scrimped on Funko merchandise. What's up with the cheap plastic taco tray?
No patches!!! No pins!!!! No t-shirt!!! And the pop that was included....was meh!
Amazon & Funko need to communicate and make the VENOM box AWESOME!!!
Otherwise...I'll cancel my subscription and go back to buying Pops! in the wild.
top_exclaim.title: Not as good as the old Funko subscription box.

top_exclaim.text: I love the quality and care that goes into each box. Natural ingredients,  perfect for DIY home-spa/self care, or as a gift for someone special!!! I love that each month features a different "theme ", or main ingredient/scent.... sustainable products,  packaged with care!!! Love it!!!! Highly recommend!!!!.
top_exclaim.title: Highly giftable/self-pampering!!

top_exclaim.text: Dollar Tree Toys!! Treats were nasty!! None of cats interested!! No theme :(  waste of money, no comparison to a bark box! Very disappointed… gave prices of items in box at $26 I paid 20!! So $6 is not a deal when the Toys were terribly over priced!! ($7 for a ribbon on a stick!! ) WILL Be CANCELING!
top_exclaim.title: Dollar Tree Toys!! No Comparison to BarkBox!! Waste!!

top_exclaim.text:
Update: I just received the April 2021 box and it too is AMAZING!!!! This is my 3rd or 4th box and I think they get even better with every new box!!!!!! I added a pic for this months. It's the red one.

By far the best subscription box I have ever subscribed to. Every single item is super cute, great quality and functional. I thought I had every item of Friends merch they made until I got this box. Most of the items are not items of Friends stuff you see everywhere. For example, the chick and the duck salt and pepper shakers! Definitely a first for me and they are adorable!
I have included a picture of everything that came in the Fall 2020 box. You can choose your size for clothing and the sizes are unisex. I couldn't even throw away the box it came in. I had a hard time throwing away all of the smaller boxes the merch came in, inside the big box!
If you're hesitant, go for it! You can always cancel your subscription if you don't like your first box. Also, since each item comes individually packaged, give the items you don't like away as gifts to other Friends fans.
top_exclaim.title: WORTH EVERY PENNY. LOVE IT!!

top_exclaim.text:
[[VIDEOID:2a1626358603612bd32b24bdeee9a193]] I’ve never made a video and it was on the fly... spur of the moment in my utter disappointment!
Similar to dollar tree toys. Well no... dollar tree has a nicer selection 😝
I’m not a cheapskate.... however I’m not giving 25 dollars a month for cheap dollar quality, made in China... cats won’t play with , mediocre garbage!
The treat was a HUGE JOKE!!
Only . 0.3 oz of freeze dried venison. In a big bag only with a little bit in the bottom!! Its honestly laughable!! Ahhh lol lol
Don’t waste &25/ month!
You don’t even get 25 dollars worth of garbage!! Awful! So disappointed! 😝
top_exclaim.title: Not worth 5 dollars !!

top_exclaim.text: My dog, adopted from the shelter last month, was sent home with a Bark Box, donated by the company to our local humane society. It was the box for tough chewers. He's a sheltie, and the toys were bigger than him!  I drove the toys back to the shelter 23 miles away so another dog could benefit, and he ate the treats.  I ordered this Medium Bark Box to get him appropriately sized toys. He was thrilled with this and so was I. Quality treats and toys!!!! US made! EXC. Both dog and owner happy! Well rounded box. We'll be back!!!!! Thank you Bark Box for helping out our local shelter and for a great product!
top_exclaim.title: My new shelter Sheltie was thrilled and so was I!

top_exclaim.text: I loooooove this subscription!!!! I got the choice if I wanted natural or glam lash styles and all of the lashes I’ve received are GORGEOUS!!!! If I could give 10 stars!!!!! Before I found this subscription I was paying 20 a pair for brand name, same quality just doesn’t have Huda on the box.
top_exclaim.title: Gorgeous!!!!!

top_exclaim.text: When it said it was for women of color, I figured that I would give it a chance. I just received the box today and was amazed about all the stuff I had received! The Dove products I was thinking about buying,  but they saved me a trip! Thank you so much!😊 The watermelon bubble bath smelled wonderful! The Brazilian Bare shave syrup, exfoliating bath gloves (my go to is a loofa), and the Green Goo deodorant I haven't heard of the brands,  but very excited to try out! And it came with a bag with "We're All In This Together", such a wonderful positive message. I am definitely can't wait for the next box!!! Thank you for a wonderful box/bag!!!!!😊
top_exclaim.title: LOVED IT!!!!

top_exclaim.text:
I love this STEM Club! We have received 3 boxes so far and all of them are great! My grandsons are 2 1/2 and 4 and they love the two building type toys we got. This month we received the gears gears gears set which is crazy great! So many science leasons here! And so many to go as they grow and understand all they can do with this "toy"
I read a review that said they were charged more than the 19.99 and I just want to add a thought, when they are shipped I get an alert and it says my gears gears gears is coming. My first reaction is Wha? I didnt order anything. Then I look in my ordees and it shows the gears and a price of 49.99! Yikes I say! Then I looked in order details and it takes off the rest so my total was $19.99!!
So this is another great thing about this club!! What a deal!! I am planning to do this club and the next levels as my boys grow!
top_exclaim.title: This is awesome!!

top_five_star_obscene.text: LOVE THIS COMPANY! The food that comes with these boxes is always fun, and products I go looking for after. A while back I got one of those hammocks, love that thing anytime year.  Overall its just nice getting gifts from a company that seems to put actual thought into what they send, rather than just a hand full of cheap crap. Looking forward to summer and cairn boxes that keep me outdoors!
top_five_star_obscene.title: Do It!

top_five_star_obscene.text:
I was a little hesitant to try this after someof the reviews stating they tried it for a month and got something "crappy". But we have been doing this for 6 mo.straight and we have gotten some pretty awesome STEM products! Some of the products in both subscription levels we have received were, lego kit, coding caterpillar,Engino Discovering Stem: Levers,...Thames & Kosmos Wind Power 2.0,Gravity Maze, smart circuits, a science experiment kit, and several other ones.

We do a subscription of 3-4 year olds and one for 8-13.
We have always gotten products in both categories, that have been worth more than 20.00 if I were to buy them out right. My boys love the cool stuff they receive and I highly recommend the STEM club !
top_five_star_obscene.title: straight and we have gotten some pretty awesome STEM products

top_five_star_obscene.text:
I don't get what everyone is complaining about.
READ THE DESCRIPTION!
You're not always getting a T- shirt it says it in the description.
You're getting some really cool stuff ( ok also some crap like a golden Hulk PEZ dispenser but my 9 year old daughter loved it so wasn't a waste)
The Venom box was awesome (the stress ball came at a perfect time lol)
If you like Marvel and any grab bag type deals the is one for you.
I did loot crate for 3 months and it all went up on ebay except ironically a Venom shirt.
Definitely worth it!
top_five_star_obscene.title: Worth it!

top_five_star_obscene.text: My dogs hated one of the treats, which is unusual for them, as they eat things out of the trash and lick urine from other dogs.  hmmm...are they telling me something?  They did however love the toys.  The 8 month old German Shepherd destroyed them in less than a day, but it's expected with him, since I think he's taking steroids, but anytime I bring it up to him, he gets angry.
top_five_star_obscene.title: German Shepherd

top_five_star_obscene.text: The products we receive have been fun family time with an educational opportunity. Both items were construction base, either building blocks for vehicles or making colorful designs screwing in screws into a plastic board. Hoping to get science base toys next time.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Fun and educational

top_five_star_obscene.text:
Something different for my dog. He destroyed the Halloween Pumpkin toy in just a few minutes, so it does not have a squeaker; it went in the garbage! He likes the treats; still has the remaining toy in the box; he’ll get it tomorrow.
TP Roll is a hit….has been busy with it this am!!
top_five_star_obscene.title: Loki says thanks!! My dog liked it; that’s what’s important!

top_five_star_obscene.text: So i decided to try out a bigger box since i have 2 cats, even though they dont like every toy in the box they liked the treats and any toy filled with cat nip so i opted for 2 more boxes, compete disappointment! They basically sent the same stuff, cheap garbage filled toys, none with cat nip and the same treats (i am not about to spent $20 just for treats!) 3 boxes later and i feel duped! Cancelled my subscription immediately, will conduct my own toys  for them, don't trust what they use to fill these that came, sounds like plastic waste as fillers.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Thought it was a good idea

top_five_star_obscene.text: I saw some mixed reviews and decided to give it a try. All went well, and received some bad-ass shades that were worth more than what the subscription cost, plus some other goodies. Overall, don't let douche bags decided what you pay for, be adventurous because sometimes you get lucky.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Pure Awesome

top_five_star_obscene.text: If you think Pink Floyd and the clash are garbage this really isn’t the club for you, and if you want to “pick your own record” it DEFEATS THE PURPOSE” just buy the record you want. I’m sure Amazon carries it
top_five_star_obscene.title: STOP WHINING

top_five_star_obscene.text: Actually a nice shirt. Very comfortable and seems well made. I normally beat the hell out of my clothes so we'll see how it holds up over time. The design is pretty cool on the first one too. I'm not really a fan of Miles Morales but it's still such a cool shirt I have no problem sporting it anyway. I'm even wearing it now. I'm quite happy with the shirt club so far.
top_five_star_obscene.title: A really decent shirt

top_five_star_obscene.text:
I've a 60 lb PIT found hiding under car. Wasn't gonna keep her but she saved my damned cat, that was 15 months ago. While I don't give daily (she gets a wide variety) the convenience is great, the variety is nice. A brother has a lab and a pug mix, I'm able to treat them with some too.

Might add an order for the cat and more bigger treats later (for neighborhood dogs on our walks), but these are a good value.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Nice variety, and convenient.

top_five_star_obscene.text: I recently received my 4th box and wasn't disappointed. With every box, I evaluate should I cancel or keep it but there are always 2-4 things I find I can't live without and reorder. When I evaluate the top ticket item ROI, it's a great value for the money. What I don't use/need I gift to my step-son/sons-in-law that appreciate and look forward to them. My only criticizism to GQ and Amazon, be aware of regional/seasonal limitations. Box 2 arrived the end of May when our average temperature was 105 degrees and the box sat in a mail truck for 6 hours. Items melted or the caps melted shut and went immediately into the trash.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Money well spent

top_five_star_obscene.text:
Been a subscriber for 3 months now. Got some things I love and use everyday. Got some things that went to the shop in the garage to be used in the future. We moved to a new house about 3 months ago and my tools are spread all over between the garage, the shop, the shed, and the house. Around midnight I needed a flat head to swap out the swivel sling on my Grandfather’s Remington 700 30-06 the other night. Couldn’t find what I needed without waking up my wife. Remembered I had the Tactica M250 in the shop and got the job done. No one was hurt except a few beers.

Not been disappointed yet. The BattlBox subscriber community on Facebook is friendly, apolitical, and funny as hell. The owners/operators interact frequently and graciously accept feedback.

No complaints on my end.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Good to go - Satisfied - But When Will The Zombies Come?

top_five_star_obscene.text: It is a good product and I really enjoyed it. But no way in hell do 7 masks cost 19.90$..... I checked the price for one was 2$.... So something does not add up...
top_five_star_obscene.title: Good for the first price (50% off) but would not pay 20$ each month for that

top_five_star_one_word.title: Knowing your dog will eat it
